What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A man wearing sunglasses and a light blue tank top stands on the sand with people behind him while children and adults dig near a blue bin to build a sandcastle structure. Text banners reading Castle Beach and East Coast Parkway appear at the bottom of the screen alongside a logo with red text reading SQUIRKS visible in the corner.

canonical_answer: At 0s, a man in a blue tank top smiles at the camera; at 4s, he tilts his head back while text appears; at 12s, people gather near flags on the sand; at 14s, children begin digging and building a sandcastle; at 18s, a person in a yellow shirt pats down the sand structure.
